name: Pagewise
description: A faster, structured way to understand any web page with a screen reader, powered by Claude.

_execute_action.description: Toggle the Pagewise side panel for the current tab

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self'; object-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' https://api.anthropic.com; frame-ancestors 'none'
